org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth.OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder

Packages that use OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth
OAuth 2.0 / OIDC integration for the Juneau REST server.

  • Uses of OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oauth that return OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.cacheTtl(Duration value)
    Sets the cache TTL.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.clientId(String value)
    Sets the OAuth client ID used for HTTP Basic auth against the introspection endpoint.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.clientSecret(String value)
    Sets the OAuth client secret as a literal string.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.clientSecretSupplier(Supplier<String> value)
    Sets the OAuth client secret via a supplier (useful for rotating secrets).
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.clock(Clock value)
    Overrides the Clock used for cache expiry.
    static OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.create()
    Static creator.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.httpRequestConfigurator(Consumer<com.nimbusds.oauth2.sdk.http.HTTPRequest> value)
    Sets a callback that customizes the Nimbus HTTPRequest before it is sent.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.introspectionEndpoint(URI value)
    Sets the introspection endpoint URL.
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.requiredScopes(String... scopes)
    Adds required scopes (scope enforcement lives on the validator, not the filter).
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder
    OAuthIntrospectionValidator.Builder.tokenCache(TokenCache value)
    Sets a custom token cache.
